ground_truth.title: Deal Analytics
ground_truth.main_content: Interested in a career in Deal Analytics? Deals Analytics is a dedicated and client-facing team focused on applying advanced analytics in Deals. Deal Analytics professionals expand client confidence related to key deal questions by delivering incremental insights - this is done by combining deal expertise, advanced technologies, analytical techniques and expanded datasets. Deal Analytics is a capability that fits within our existing delivery model to bring new insights to our clients through an integrated PwC approach. Client benefits include speed and depth of insights, greater deal confidence and data-driven perspectives (diligence and post-deal). PwC benefits include expanded scopes and revenue on each deal, provide bridge to other PwC services and greater client stickiness. Don't see a job that interests you at this time? Join our Talent Community to stay connected, learn more about PwC, career opportunities and events that interest you!
